steps.title: Portal design-token source resolved
steps.action: adopt runtime-delivered resolved PortalPartTokens as the live source when the handshake exposes them; else keep the local mirror
steps.expected_visual: portal renders the runtime's active-profile look

steps.title: Scene display area resolved
steps.action: use live scene dimensions for portal placement and drag bounds
steps.expected_visual: portal can be dragged across the full HUD surface

steps.title: Portal size resolved
steps.action: scale portal defaults from live scene dimensions unless explicit size overrides were provided
steps.expected_visual: portal occupies a readable portion of the detected display

steps.title: Visual profile swap
steps.action: cycle compact → standard → expanded portal token profiles (palette + typography + dimensions)
steps.expected_visual: portal palette AND chrome dimensions shift each cycle; body text remains readable; no layout collapse

steps.title: Profile 'compact'
steps.action: apply 'compact' portal tokens: 680×520px, title_font=16.0pt, body_font=14.0pt, frame_bg=rgba(0.063, 0.094, 0.149, 0.851)
steps.expected_visual: portal reskins to 'compact' palette + dimensions; content remains readable

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: portal reskinned to 'compact' profile; palette AND chrome dimensions shifted (frame + text sourced from resolved tokens) and body text remained readable with no layout collapse

steps.title: Profile 'standard'
steps.action: apply 'standard' portal tokens: 1720×1360px, title_font=16.0pt, body_font=16.0pt, frame_bg=rgba(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.302)
steps.expected_visual: portal reskins to 'standard' palette + dimensions; content remains readable

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: portal reskinned to 'standard' profile; palette AND chrome dimensions shifted (frame + text sourced from resolved tokens) and body text remained readable with no layout collapse

steps.title: Profile 'expanded'
steps.action: apply 'expanded' portal tokens: 1978×1564px, title_font=20.0pt, body_font=18.0pt, frame_bg=rgba(0.102, 0.071, 0.024, 0.851)
steps.expected_visual: portal reskins to 'expanded' palette + dimensions; content remains readable

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: portal reskinned to 'expanded' profile; palette AND chrome dimensions shifted (frame + text sourced from resolved tokens) and body text remained readable with no layout collapse

steps.title: Profile 'standard'
steps.action: apply 'standard' portal tokens: 1720×1360px, title_font=16.0pt, body_font=16.0pt, frame_bg=rgba(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.302)
steps.expected_visual: portal reskins to 'standard' palette + dimensions; content remains readable

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: portal reskinned to 'standard' profile; palette AND chrome dimensions shifted (frame + text sourced from resolved tokens) and body text remained readable with no layout collapse

steps.title: Text Stream Portal scenario complete
steps.action: review transcript and capture UX notes
steps.expected_visual: portal visible until cleanup releases the lease

steps.title: Portal lease released
steps.action: release the lease before closing the session
steps.expected_visual: all portal tiles are removed from the HUD
